englishDefinitions: used to say that two people had agreed to temporarily stop their romantic relationship
often used to excuse behavior that happened during that time
persianTranslation: ما موقتاً از هم جدا شده بودیم
examples: "We were on a break," he said, trying to explain what happened.
They kept arguing about whether they were really on a break.
The phrase became famous from a popular TV show.
